title: Song of the Year Grammy Award Winners - PopVortex
text:
Song of the Year Grammy Award Information

2026 Winner: WILDFLOWER by Billie Eilisch claimed the 2026 Song of the Year Grammy Award at the 68th Annual Grammy Awards (February 1, 2026).

2026 Nominees: The award recognized eight nominees:
- Abracadabra (Lady Gaga)
- Anxiety (Doechii)
- APT. (ROSÉ & Bruno Mars)
- DtMF (Bad Bunny)
- Golden (HUNTR/X, EJAE, AUDREY NUNA, REI AMI & KPop Demon Hunters Cast)
- luther (Kendrick Lamar with SZA)
- Manchild (Sabrina Carpenter)
- WILDFLOWER (Billie Eilish) — Winner

Notable Achievement: This represents Eilish's third Song of the Year win. "Five composers have won the award on more than one occasion," including Eilish and her collaborator Finneas O'Connell, who have triumphed three times for their compositions across multiple Grammy ceremonies.
